channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: CodeQL pull requests insights on security overview now cover all protected branches
item.description: The CodeQL pull request insights tab in GitHub security overview now reports Copilot Autofix and alert statistics from all protected branches, not just the default branch. This gives you a… The post CodeQL pull requests insights on security overview now cover all protected branches appeared first...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: The Durable Task Scheduler Consumption SKU is now Generally Available
item.description: Today, we're excited to announce that the Durable Task Scheduler Consumption SKU has reached General Availability. Developers can now run durable workflows and agents on Azure with pay-per-use pricing, no storage to manage, no capacity to plan, and no idle costs. Just create a scheduler, connect...
item.dc:creator: greenie-msft

item.title: Am I using Windows 98 right?
item.description: Experience AI like it's 1998. A fully private, on-device assistant in an authentic retro desktop — boot sequence, Start menu, and CRT glow. No internet needed.Step back in time and into the future.AI Desktop 98 wraps a powerful on-device AI assistant inside a fully interactive retro desktop,...
item.dc:creator: Yahyati

item.title: How do I stop Firefox from automatically opening any PDF I download?
item.description: Under Settings -> Applications, PDF is set to save file, yet every time I download a PDF, it is automatically opened and not by the windows default program associated with PDFs. How do I stop this from happening?
item.dc:creator: Jerichouy

item.title: What do I do if my acer laptop is stuck on the loading screen?
item.description: Hi all,Ran into a weird issue today. My Acer laptop powers on, shows the logo, then just stuck on the loading screen forever. No error message, no progress. Left it like that for quite a while but nothing changed.Not very experienced with troubleshooting stuff like this, so a bit hesitant to try...
item.dc:creator: Mikdao

item.title: How to Report Entra ID Group Insights
item.description: Entra ID Group Insights are a new preview feature in the Entra admin center. The lack of documentation is challenging, but it’s easy to understand what kind of insights Microsoft wants to deliver. Looking behind the scenes, we find the Graph endpoint for Group insights and can extract the data....
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: Subscription Vending in Azure: An Implementation Overview
item.description: Subscription vending is a process that enables the creation of multiple Azure subscriptions using code, based on organizational segregation or workload-specific requirements. Rather than relying on resource groups as the primary boundary, this approach treats subscriptions as the fundamental unit...
item.dc:creator: abhilashasr

item.title: EU data residency region expanding to include EFTA countries
item.description: Starting May 1, 2026, the EU data residency region for GitHub Enterprise Cloud on ghe.com will include Azure infrastructure in EFTA (European Free Trade Association) countries—specifically Norway and Switzerland—in addition… The post EU data residency region expanding to include EFTA countries...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Powering Event Driven Payments with Stripe and Azure Event Grid
item.description: Introduction Modern commerce systems are increasingly event-driven. Payments, subscriptions, refunds, disputes, and customer updates all generate signals that downstream systems must react quickly and reliably. Stripe events give developers real-time visibility into what is happening inside their...
item.dc:creator: robece

item.title: Azure Developer CLI (azd) – March 2026: Run and Debug AI Agents Locally, GitHub Copilot Integration, & Container App Jobs
item.description: Run, invoke, and monitor AI agents locally or in Microsoft Foundry with the new azd AI agent extension commands. Plus GitHub Copilot-powered project setup, Container App Jobs deployment, local preflight validation, and configurable timeouts. The post Azure Developer CLI (azd) – March 2026: Run and...
item.dc:creator: PuiChee (PC) Chan

item.title: VS Code Extension
item.description: What is a VS Code Extension? A VS Code Extension is a small program that adds new features or enhances existing functionality in Visual Studio Code. Extensions allow developers to tailor the editor to their needs by adding support for new languages, tools, themes, debuggers, commands, and...
item.dc:creator: Shikhaghildiyal

item.title: What’s new in Microsoft Sentinel: RSAC 2026
item.description: Security is entering a new era, one defined by explosive data growth, increasingly sophisticated threats, and the rise of AI-enabled operations. To keep pace, security teams need an AI-powered approach to collect, reason over, and act on security data at scale. At RSA Conference 2026 (RSAC), we’re...
item.dc:creator: spalani

item.title: Microsoft Entra Tenant Governance: Secure and Manage Multi-Tenant Environments at Scale
item.description: Managing identity across multiple tenants is a growing challenge for organizations of all sizes. Mergers, acquisitions, and the rise of shadow IT often lead to a fragmented tenant landscape—creating security and compliance blind spots that attackers are quick to exploit. Even a single poorly...
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dadzie

item.title: IOS - Embedded Webkit - Not Reporting Correct Device info
item.description: It appears that with the latest iOS versions (26.3.1 through 26.4), applications that rely on an embedded WebKit for sign-in are no longer reporting accurate device details within Device Info.Users have company-issued phones that are successfully enrolled in Intune, but when they attempt to sign in...
item.dc:creator: NexusEgo

item.title: Public Preview: Ephemeral OS Disk with full caching for VM/VMSS
item.description: Today, we’re excited to announce the public preview of Ephemeral OS disk with full caching, a new feature designed to significantly enhance performance and reliability by utilizing local storage. This feature is ideal for IO-sensitive stateless workloads, as it eliminates dependency on remote...
item.dc:creator: viveksingla

item.title: ExpressRoute Gateway Microsoft initiated migration
item.description: Important: Microsoft initiated Gateway migrations are temporarily paused. You will be notified when migrations resume. Objective The backend migration process is an automated upgrade performed by Microsoft to ensure your ExpressRoute gateways use the Standard IP SKU. This migration enhances gateway...
item.dc:creator: MekaylaMoore

item.title: GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with GitHub security
item.description: Learn how to secure your projects and keep them safe with GitHub Advanced Security. The post GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with GitHub security appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Kedasha Kerr

item.title: Addressing the OWASP Top 10 Risks in Agentic AI with Microsoft Copilot Studio
item.description: Agentic AI introduces new security risks. Learn how the OWASP Top 10 Risks for Agentic Applications maps to real mitigations in Microsoft Copilot Studio. The post Addressing the OWASP Top 10 Risks in Agentic AI with Microsoft Copilot Studio appeared first on Microsoft Security Blog.
item.dc:creator: Efim Hudis

item.title: Microsoft Entra innovations announced at RSAC 2026
item.description: Agentic AI is reshaping how organizations work, and it is fundamentally changing how we must think about protecting identity and access. As AI accelerates innovation, the number of users, devices, apps, and agents is exploding, creating an unprecedented number of digital identities across disparate...
item.dc:creator: Irina_Nechaeva

item.title: Writing Azure service-related unit tests with Docker using Spring Cloud Azure
item.description: This post shows how to write Azure service-related unit tests with Docker using Spring Cloud Azure. The post Writing Azure service-related unit tests with Docker using Spring Cloud Azure appeared first on Azure SDK Blog.
item.dc:creator: Rujun Chen

item.title: App-only authentication for unattended scripts in MicrosoftPlaces
item.description: Like other modules such as ExchangeOnline (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/exchange/app-only-auth-powershell-v2?view=exchange-ps), the Microsoft Places module should include the option do an App-only authentication.
item.dc:creator: XaviRodriguez

item.title: Intune – Unable to reliably validate application installation status via Microsoft Graph APIs
item.description: Hi Everyone,I am working on application deployment and validation using Microsoft Intune, and I am trying to implement an automated validation step to confirm whether applications are successfully installed. My primary requirementVerify application installation statusConfirm per‑device installation...
item.dc:creator: Swahlea

item.title: Modernize your ADF pipelines to unlock Fabric
item.description: Moving your Azure Data Factory and Azure Synapse pipelines to Fabric Data Factory is now fast, easy, and free!
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Windows 11 Pro on my XPS is great
item.description: Windows 11 runs smoothly and performs much better than Windows 10. The new taskbar and icons look great and sharp on my 4K XPS display and I can receive regular Windows updates now
item.dc:creator: EmmettBrooks

item.title: Windows 10 Network Options Missing
item.description: Network settings and display disappeared after network reset, but internet still works. Need help to fix this.
item.dc:creator: AnselRhodes

item.title: Windows 10 Windows.old Size Shows Differently Across Tools
item.description: WinDirStat shows Windows.old as 200+GB, Disk Cleanup as 700+GB, and File Explorer as 1.0GB. Why the huge discrepancy?
item.dc:creator: GageWilder

item.title: Windows 10 Never Seen This Screen During Update
item.description: I encountered an unknown screen while updating Windows 10 and have never seen it before. Does anyone know what this is?
item.dc:creator: AnselRhodes

item.title: CI/CD as a Platform: Shipping Microservices and AI Agents with Reusable GitHub Actions Workflows
item.description: The First Shift — Treating CI/CD as a Platform The first insight is straightforward but underused: Your CI/CD logic is infrastructure. It deserves the same design discipline as your application code. That means centralizing it. Versioning it. Exposing it as reusable, callable workflows — not...
item.dc:creator: nasreensarah

item.title: Compute auto-scaling choices to better optimize price-performance for SQL databases in Microsoft Fabric (Preview)
item.description: One of the most common pieces of feedback we hear from customers using SQL databases in Microsoft Fabric is the need for stronger cost control and predictable resource usage, especially in shared capacities. Today, SQL databases in Fabric automatically scale to meet workload demand. This delivers...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Chat with Copilot inside a report on the Power BI mobile app (Preview)
item.description: If you haven’t already, check out Arun Ulag’s hero blog “FabCon and SQLCon 2026: Unifying databases and Fabric on a single, complete platform” for a complete look at all of our FabCon and SQLCon announcements across both Fabric and our database offerings. The next evolution of in-report Copilot on...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Best fancy font generator for social media usernames and posts?
item.description: Trying to find a good fancy font generator for creating stylish text for social media (Instagram, TikTok, etc.). The default fonts are too plain, and most online tools either look outdated or generate weird symbols that don’t display properly on all devices. Using a Windows 11 laptop and mainly...
item.dc:creator: Asaoniu

item.title: Create issues from Slack with Copilot
item.description: You can now create GitHub Issues directly from Slack using natural language with the GitHub app for Slack. Mention @GitHub in any channel, describe the work you need to track,… The post Create issues from Slack with Copilot appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: The best way to repair a corrupted mp4 video file?
item.description: I recently used a data recovery tool to get back a few MP4 videos after an accidental drive format. While the file sizes look correct and the recovery software flagged them as "healthy," none of my media players can open them. Most players just show a black screen or throw an error saying the file...
item.dc:creator: Zaachary

item.title: How do I fix disk boot failure from my windows 10 pc?
item.description: Hi everyone,Made a bootable USB drive and tried to boot from it. However, this error message shows up on the screen:Disk Boot Failure, Insert System Disk and Press EnterNot sure what caused this issue. The PC was working fine before, and no major changes were made recently. I’m worried it might be...
item.dc:creator: Samuelyur

item.title: Conditional Access Policies are the Best Way to Block Weekend Access to Microsoft 365
item.description: Conditional access policies are very powerful. A beta feature appears to support time-limited blocks, but maybe the new feature is not needed because the same effect can be accomplished today through a mixture of conditional access policies, dynamic groups, and Azure Automation runbooks (or...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: From Toil to Trust: How Azure SRE Agent Is Redefining Cloud Operations
item.description: As Azure environments scale, infrastructure teams face a familiar challenge: operating reliably at scale.Outages are no longer caused by a single VM or misconfigured service—they emerge from complex dependencies across compute, networking, storage, and platform services. Azure SRE Agent is designed...
item.dc:creator: siddhigupta

item.title: Building Your First Local RAG Application with Foundry Local
item.description: A developer's guide to building an offline, mobile-responsive AI support agent using Retrieval-Augmented Generation, the Foundry Local SDK, and JavaScript. Imagine you are a gas field engineer standing beside a pipeline in a remote location. There is no Wi-Fi, no mobile signal, and you need a...
item.dc:creator: Lee_Stott

item.title: Gain Visibility into Cloud Browser Usage with Browser Activity Logs in Playwright Workspaces
item.description: Today, we're announcing a new feature to view the usage metrics for a browser session using the Browser Activity Logs in Playwright Workspaces. Modern test automation and browser-based workflows increasingly rely on cloud-hosted browsers. As teams scale their usage across test runs, automation...
item.dc:creator: AbhinavPremsekhar

item.title: Synchronizing Azure Storage Across Isolated Private Endpoint Networks
item.description: Introduction In Azure repatriation programs, enterprises often need to migrate large volumes of blob data from a source Azure environment to a target Azure environment under strict security and network isolation constraints. A typical repatriation setup includes fully isolated source and target...
item.dc:creator: deepakkumarv

item.title: Microsoft can you bring back the new microsoft rewards dashboard
item.description: Yeah i know its not related to anything but it is related to Microsoft rewards program (and dashboard)yesterday when I saw this dashboard i was shocked because I can get a lot of points in bonuses at the first day of next month. Since i was close to my rewards goal worth 6550 points, i was very...
item.dc:creator: Isaiah_Cacho_95

item.title: System Windows Ram Problem Fix
item.description: You’ve probably seen this happen — you leave your desktop or laptop running, and after a while the system starts eating a huge chunk of your RAM, even on modern hardware.Today I’m bringing a fix that removes this issue permanently and gives Windows back the speed, stability, and clean behavior it...
item.dc:creator: kikero_exe

item.title: RAM stability after 21 hours uptime – optimization results
item.description: After my RAM optimization, the system remains fully stable even after 21 hours of continuous uptime. ✔️ RAM no longer fills up with nonsenseMemory usage stays within normal limits and Windows finally handles the standby cache the way it should. ✔️ High standby cache (18+ GB)This means faster app...
item.dc:creator: kikero_exe

item.title: Windows Insider Feature Update 26200.8079 not installing (Beta Channel)
item.description: Hello Windows Insiders!I'm having trouble installing Beta Channel build 26200.8079 via Windows Update.the build downloads, I reboot to complete the build installation and as soon as I reboot I open windows update and there is an error that says:Windows 11 Insider Feature Update 26200.8079 -...
item.dc:creator: rooczo

item.title: Autonomous Self-Healing for Azure VMware Solution Private Clouds
item.description: Overview Azure VMware Solution operates a global fleet of production private clouds, each running a full VMware NSX and vCenter Server control plane. As an example, when a VMware NSX Manager cluster loses quorum, NSX can surface multiple related alarms, but the documented impact is more specific...
item.dc:creator: RohanB

item.title: Device not linking despite confirmed account sign-in
item.description: Both my laptop and PC are signed in using my Microsoft account, however my PC will not appear as a linked device anywhere other than in my PC's device settings. Looking in browser / on another device only shows the laptop. I contacted support and they confirmed this is an account backend bug and...
item.dc:creator: Jonahp97

item.title: From Impersonation Calls to Transparent Reporting: Defending the New Front Door of Attacks
item.description: Email is still a major entry point—but it’s no longer the only one that matters. Today’s attackers are increasingly shifting to collaboration channels like Microsoft Teams, where trust is implicit and interaction is real time. Decisions happen fast, and that changes the economics of attacks....
item.dc:creator: JeffreyPinkston

item.title: How Microsoft Defender protects high-value assets in real-world attack scenarios
item.description: High-value assets including domain controllers, web servers, and identity infrastructure are frequent targets in sophisticated attacks. Microsoft Defender applies asset-aware protection using Microsoft Security Exposure Management to detect and block threats against these critical systems. This...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft Defender Security Research Team

item.title: What AI Agents for Modernization Look Like in Practice
item.description: We’ve all been put onto an initiative to “modernize” our company’s applications. But talk about a haphazard and confusing project to be put on. Apps are older than anyone first thought, there are dependencies nobody can explain, and business critical services blocked behind another team's roadmap....
item.dc:creator: PabloLopes

item.title: Building the agentic future together at JDConf 2026
item.description: JDConf 2026 is just weeks away, and I’m excited to welcome Java developers, architects, and engineering leaders from around the world for two days of learning and connection. Now in its sixth year, JDConf has become a place where the Java community compares notes on their real-world production...
item.dc:creator: Mayunk_Jain

item.title: The Retirement of SharePoint Alerts is a Pain in the Rear
item.description: I’ve used a SharePoint alert to create an emailed daily digest of changes made to files in a document library for seven years. Microsoft plans to retire SharePoint Alerts in July 2026, and the race is on to find a replacement. Regretfully, neither Power Automate nor SharePoint Rules seem capable of...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond
